title: orophea ovalifolia
intro: Orophea ovalifolia, also known as the Oval-leaved Orophea, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of India and Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Orophea ovalifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions, such as wounds and eczema. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic properties.
